definitions.text: The buying and selling of goods and services on a market.
A particular instance of buying or selling, or a series of related transactions executed as a single investment.
examples: I did no trades with them once the rumors started.

definitions.text: An idea or strategy for an investment on a market.
examples: "Sell America" is the latest trade on Wall Street.
He withdrew money to his bank account after several years of trading stocks on E-Trade.

definitions.text: To be traded at a certain price or under certain conditions.

examples: Will you trade your precious watch for my earring?

definitions.text: Of a product, produced for sale in the ordinary bulk retail trade and hence of only the most basic quality.
